---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in wtf-windows or one of its diagnostic tools
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Which tool is affected?**
- [ ] wtf-windows (dispatch/infrastructure)
- [ ] wtf-restarted
- [ ] Other: ___

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
```bash
wtf <command that fails>
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened. Include any error output.

**Environment**
- wtf-windows version (`wtf --version`):
- Tool version (if applicable, e.g. `wtf restarted --version`):
- Windows version (`winver`):
- Python version (`python --version`):
- Running as administrator: yes / no

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
